context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60: All three recurring issues have been fixed and verified. 1) Demo/test user filtering: ALL 8 explore endpoints (trending, trending posts, most-wanted, near-you, recent-hauls, suggested-collectors, active-isos, buzzing) now call get_hidden_user_ids() and exclude those IDs. The function queries for is_hidden, is_test, demo/test usernames, and example.com/test.com emails. 2) Profile photo update: POST /api/upload returns {file_id, path, url} where url contains proxy path. SettingsPage.js line 117 constructs URL as ${API}/files/serve/${path}. PUT /api/auth/me saves avatar_url. GET /api/auth/me returns saved URL. 3) Sale listing photos: ISOPage.js line 281 constructs photo URLs as ${API}/files/serve/${path}. The proxy endpoint GET /api/files/serve/{path} validates honeygroove/ namespace prefix (403 for other namespaces) and serves images with correct Content-Type headers.

verified_features.demo_user_filtering: All 8 explore endpoints filter out is_hidden, is_test, demo/test usernames, example.com/test.com emails
verified_features.file_serve_proxy_security: 403 for wrong namespace, 404/500 for missing file, 200 with image/* content-type for valid files
verified_features.upload_response_format: Returns {file_id, path, url} with url containing proxy endpoint
verified_features.avatar_update_chain: Upload → proxy URL → save to DB → re-fetch verified end-to-end
